title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'documentation' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'documentation' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/documentation/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/documentation/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load documentation's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform documentation's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/documentation/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Harness/spoke/local/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/documentation/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'documentation'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.
completion_notes: Documentation advisor warmup completed: (1) Verified 4 findings logged in findings-log.jsonl covering v3 path refs, AP tooling docs gap, Herald activation status, and CLAUDE.md rules. (2) Created 2 additional haiku task lugs for Herald daemon teaching (impl-herald-daemon-activation-teaching-documentation-v1) and CLAUDE.md v3-path update (impl-update-claude-md-v3-paths-documentation-v1), complementing existing lugs for v3 teaching paths and AP tooling docs. Total 4 actionable findings → 4 haiku lugs for crew-maintenance initiative. (3) Updated last_run_at timestamps to 2026-06-27T02:45:19.531219Z in both schedule-index.json and scan_state.json.
